prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类/理科最低位次约383→409→369→436名，近4年波动较大，2024年曾回升至369名（近年最优），2025年回落至436名（近年最差），整体呈震荡 态势，2025年基准位次约436名；该校在四川省物理类/理科招生计划：2022年68人、2023年68人、2024年64人、2025年61人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划72人，较2025年扩招约18%，扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第5名，稳居全国顶 尖高校行列，办学层次极高，对考生持续具有强吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与学校管理类事件；但抖音综合热度排名第4（高热），短 视频曝光量极大，报考关注度居高不下；历史投档异常方面，2022年曾在河南出现投档线暴跌信号，但近年未见明显断档；拥有A+学科11个（中国语言文学、中 国史、哲学、政治学、数学、新闻传播学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、马克思主义理论、公共卫生与预防医学），A/A-学科十余个，学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力稳固。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 复旦大学位于上海市，在四川省招生占比约2%-4%（近年 数据），属于跨省招生，无本省倾斜优势，报考主要依赖学校自身吸引力；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业持续高热推荐，与复旦大学物理类招生专业高度契合；四川省2026年考生总数约535000人，较2025 年（约462767人）增长约15.6%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次436名、2026年扩招约18%（推低位次数字增大）与四川省考生总 数增长约15.6%（推高位次数字减小）的双向对冲；再结合学校顶尖层次、抖音高热关注度及热门工科专业持续升温，预计竞争略有加剧，最终预测最低 位次约473名，区间419–527名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 Physics Category/Science minimum rankings approximately 383→409→369→436, with significant fluctuations in the past 4 years. In 2024, it rebounded to 369 (best in recent years), and in 2025, it fell to 436 (worst in recent years), showing an overall oscillating trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 436. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan Province for Physics Category/Science: 68 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 64 in 2024, 61 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction year by year. The 2026 plan is 72, an increase of about 18% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in China, with an extremely high level of education, maintaining strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics and school management. However, Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, and application attention remains high. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a signal of a sharp drop in admission cutoff in Henan in 2022, but no obvious gaps in recent years. It has 11 A+ disciplines (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Philosophy, Political Science, Mathematics, Journalism and Communication, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Marxist Theory, Public Health and Preventive Medicine), and more than ten A/A- disciplines, with extremely strong academic strength, maintaining a solid appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Fudan University is located in Shanghai, with an enrollment proportion in Sichuan Province of about 2%-4% (recent data), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local preference advantage, and application mainly relies on the university's own appeal. Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with Fudan University's Physics Category enrollment majors. The total number of candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (about 462,767), with a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 436, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 18% (pushing the ranking number larger), and the total number of candidates in Sichuan Province increasing by about 15.6% (pushing the ranking number smaller), a two-way offset; further considering the university's top level, high Douyin attention, and the continued heating up of popular engineering majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify. The final predicted minimum ranking is approximately 473, with a range of 419–527.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<419), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>527), it is recommended to mainly apply to Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 History Category/Liberal Arts minimum rankings approximately 82→80→94→136, showing an overall backward trend. In the past 2 years, it moved from 94 to 136, a cumulative backward shift of about 42 places. The 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 136. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan Province for History Category/Liberal Arts: 2022: 17 students, 2023: 17 students, 2024: 21 students, 2025: 20 students; 2026 plan: 22 students, an increase of about 10% compared to 2025, moderate expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities nationwide, with profound liberal arts heritage and strong appeal to liberal arts candidates. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents; but Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), with extremely high application attention. The 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive (scientific research achievements or major honors), with no obvious enrollment gaps in recent years. Liberal arts disciplines include A+ disciplines: Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Philosophy, Journalism and Communication, Marxist Theory, Theoretical Economics, etc.; A-level disciplines: Applied Economics, Sociology, Business Administration, etc., with top national comprehensive strength in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law: divided and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication: clearly discouraged; Chinese Language/Chinese: relatively hot and recommended; Education/Teacher Training: divided and wait-and-see, partially matching Fudan University's liberal arts enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Law, Economics, Philosophy, etc.). In 2026, the total number of candidates in Sichuan Province is approximately 535,000, with History Category estimated at about 205,975, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025 (about 177,978), intensifying competition. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, with a liberal arts enrollment share in Sichuan Province of about 2%-4%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 136, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10% (pushing the ranking number larger), and the increase in Sichuan Province History Category candidates of about 15.7% (pushing the ranking number smaller), along with the university's top liberal arts strength, high Douyin attention, and the recent trend of continuous backward movement in rankings, competition is expected to intensify slightly. The final predicted minimum ranking is about 141, with a range of 93–189.
